headline: First Solar (FSLR) Stock Valuation Check After Strong Recent Share Price Gains
summary: Recent performance puts First Solar (FSLR) on investor watchlists First Solar (FSLR) has quietly moved onto more radars, with the stock up about 15% over the past month and roughly 34% over the past 3 months. This has prompted closer scrutiny of its fundamentals. See our latest analysis for First Solar. The recent 30 day share price return of about 15%, and 90 day gain of roughly 34%, contrasts with a slightly negative year to date share price return. At the same time, the 1 year total...
